seriesid=`757073` titleid=`2002185` mediaid=`cbd2d3bc29f3b1a1bf069114fa7dd8ccf52d9ef9`  
_Slime Princess needs a husband or else she'll lose the Slime Kingdom to her obnoxious sis. Finn steps in to save the day but first they will need to win a series of love games to prove to Slime Princess's dad that they are really in love._
